examples: Rather than hosting all-night keggers and attending boozy pub crawls, you may find yourself spending entire afternoons playing peekaboo.
McGregor is the journo, never named: cynical, boozy and miserable in the classical manner.
My boyfriend and I got together at the end of a boozy New Year's Eve party three years ago.
For a taste of the bar scene that spans the boroughs, start your boozy odyssey in Greenpoint.
Boozy picnics on a mass scale occur in parks boasting cherry blossom trees, as hanami fever grips the land.
